content: 我做了一个AI求职助手，帮用户优化简历和模拟面试。目前0用户，预算每月200美元，希望3个月达到1000注册用户。
我做了一个AI求职助手，帮用户优化简历和模拟面试。目前0用户，预算每月200美元，希望3个月达到1000注册用户。
I built an AI writing assistant called WriteFlow. It helps content creators write blog posts faster. Currently 0 users, $100/month budget, want to reach 500 users in 3 months.

My product is CrabRes (crabres.com), an AI growth strategy agent for indie hackers and vibe coders. It helps any product find users by researching competitors, validating product direction, and creating detailed growth plans with ready-to-use content. Currently 0 users, $0 budget (only time investment), target: 500 users in 3 months. Markets: global (English + Chinese). I want to build in public. Give me the most detailed, specific, and creative growth plan possible — not generic advice, but exactly what to post, where, when, and the actual content.
